mapper.sql: id, Ecode, Parameter, EParameter, ClassName, ClassModel, ClassName6, ClassCode, ImpCustCName, JFormCName, CustTax, InvName, EngName, CRMType, CRMCode, TaxCode, desc, is_deleted, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.product_ecode
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.product_ecode (id, Ecode, Parameter, EParameter, ClassName, ClassModel, ClassName6, ClassCode, ImpCustCName, JFormCName, CustTax, InvName, EngName, CRMType, CRMCode, TaxCode, desc, is_deleted, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{ecode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{parameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{eparameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{classname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classname6,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{impcustcname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jformcname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custtax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{invname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{engname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{crmtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{crmcode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{taxcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{desc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update dbo.product_ecode
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=CHAR},
Ecode = #{record.ecode,jdbcType=CHAR},
Parameter = #{record.parameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
EParameter = #{record.eparameter,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ClassName = #{record.classname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassModel = #{record.classmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ClassName6 = #{record.classname6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
